# Nocturn AI — llms.txt

## What is Nocturn AI?
Nocturn AI is an autonomous hotel booking assistant built by SheersSoft (Sheers Software Sdn. Bhd.). It handles guest inquiries 24/7 via WhatsApp — even at 11:47 PM — ensuring no booking opportunity is lost.

## Problem Solved
Independent and boutique hotels in Malaysia lose 15–30% of direct booking revenue because front desk staff cannot respond to inquiries after hours or during peak periods. OTA commissions (15–25%) further erode margins. Nocturn AI eliminates both problems by acting as an always-on revenue recovery agent.

## Ideal Customer Profile (ICP)
- Independent and boutique hotels in Southeast Asia (initially Malaysia)
- 20–120 rooms
- Revenue Managers, General Managers, or Hotel Owners
- Hotels currently losing revenue to slow response times and OTA dependency

## Key Features
- 24/7 WhatsApp-native guest communication
- Autonomous booking capture and confirmation
- Real-time rate and availability sync
- Multi-language support (English, Malay, Mandarin)
- Zero-integration setup (no PMS migration required)

## Pricing (Post-Pilot)
- Starter: RM 599/month (up to 30 rooms)
- Growth: RM 899/month (up to 80 rooms, analytics dashboard)
- Enterprise: RM 1,199/month (unlimited rooms, dedicated success manager)

## Founding Cohort
Currently onboarding a limited Founding Cohort of 5 hotels at zero cost for 60 days. Apply at: https://ai.sheerssoft.com/apply
